title: polypodium adhaerens
intro: Polypodium adhaerens, also known as the Sticky Polypody or Adhesive Polypody, is a species of fern native to tropical and subtropical regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism and arthritis, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Polypodium adhaerens can be found in various forms, including dried and powdered extracts, capsules, and teas, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
